name: Magic: The Gathering Arena
description: Parses Player.log for collection, decks, match history, play-by-play game logs, drafts, rank, and inventory. Constructed coaching: personal match stats, sideboard analysis, deck evaluation. Gameplay analysis: per-turn play advice, mana efficiency, card timing, attack decisions, mulligan evaluation.
limitations: Requires 'Detailed Logs' enabled in MTGA settings
Log clears on game restart — only current session data available
Card names require Scryfall data update after new set releases
